char_status: Former 狩灵协会4科 member, Wanted 罪灵
char_overview: Former 狩灵协会4科 狩灵, labeled a 罪灵 after resigning to hunt 烬, the man whose ambush she blames herself for, will sacrifice everything to kill him with her own hands.
char_looks: Short white hair. Red eyes, scarred by past battles. Black bodysuit, light gray overshirt. High-neck collar protector, leather arm guards, thigh-high boots. 灭魂, a katana custom-forged by an assassination-specialist 工坊. Near-silent attacks, almost no sound on contact
char_flaws: Weak in direct combat; guilt eroded judgment, making her reckless.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-瞬影: Projects up to two shadow clones that deal real damage. Shadows persist longer in darkness, vanish quickly under sunlight. Can swap positions with any active shadow.
char_mission: Track and kill 烬 at any cost.

char_relationships.烬: The man who orchestrated the ambush that destroyed her life and blinded her closest friend. She hunts him with the single-mindedness of someone who no longer expects to survive the chase.
char_relationships.慎: Her former closest friend in 狩灵协会4科, her tactical error led his squad into the ambush that blinded him. Has never forgiven herself. Sends anonymous intel on 烬 that he almost certainly knows is from her.
char_relationships.狩灵协会: Former workplace, now the institution that hunts her. Will cut down anyone sent to stop her.
